hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -d ~/.maxos/workspace ]; then echo "WORKSPACE_EXISTS — help with whatever the user needs. Read docs/design-spec.md for architecture."; else echo "NO_WORKSPACE — FRESH INSTALL. You MUST read .claude/skills/onboard.md and follow every step. Do NOT explore the repo, check git, run tests, or read README. Go directly to the onboard skill NOW."; fi'
